sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime64 (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_datetime64 (id, event_time) VALUES (1, toDateTime64('2023-10-01 12:00:00.123', 3));
UPDATE test_datetime64 SET event_time = toDateTime64(1633046400.456, 6) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toDateTime64('2023-10-01 12:00:00', 3) AS converted_time FROM test_datetime64;
SELECT id, toTypeName(toDateTime64(1651622400000, 4)) AS type_name FROM test_datetime64;
